## Runtime.IRuntimeConfection.isRolledTruffle() method

Returns true if this is a rolled truffle confection. When true, rolled truffle-specific properties are available.

**Signature:**

```typescript
isRolledTruffle(): this is IRuntimeRolledTruffle;
```
**Returns:**

this is [IRuntimeRolledTruffle](./ts-chocolate.runtime.iruntimerolledtruffle.md)
